About

Hello, I am Frank, a Software Engineer living in London, UK 🇬🇧

Technologies/Skills:

TypeScript, JavaScript, React, Redux, Node.js, Swift, iOS, Ruby, Python, Django, Go, GraphQL, REST, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Docker, AWS and GCP.

I’m interested in:

Rust, functional programming (Haskell, OCaml, Clojure, Scala, etc.), Open Source, Compilers and Distributed Systems.
